title: Map. Plan. Review. Repeat.
lede: One simple loop, repeated every session. The same one Martin teaches at his surf camps — now in your pocket.

steps.title: Annotate the lineup with your finger.
steps.body: Pick from 8 break types — open beach, point, reef, rivermouth, breakwall and more. Drop your "Me" pin, draw the wave direction, mark the rip, place landmarks. Auto-saved as you draw.

steps.title: Guided plan in seven questions.
steps.body: Where will you sit? How will you paddle out? What's your goal wave count? Surf Reader walks you through Martin's 7-question coaching flow and writes a clean session plan you can save and revisit.

steps.title: Seven criteria. Five stars each.
steps.body: From paddle-out to wave selection to bottom-turn execution — score yourself honestly. The app calculates your Skill Rating, charts your progression, and pulls up your map next session so you can pick up exactly where you left off.
